author: MIYh
content: Plan: Add new crate crossbridge-supervisor/ to workspace. Single-task tokio event loop in lib.rs (run(socket_path, base_dir)) using tokio::select! to multiplex listener.accept() and per-conn EOF detection via futures::stream::SelectAll over per-connection read halves wrapped as a Stream. Topology: HashMap<group, HashMap<slug, OwnedWriteHalf>>; reverse map conn_id -> (group, slug) for O(1) departure. Send notifications by writing length-prefixed SupervisorMessage::Notification over write halves. Tests in tests/integration.rs spawn the supervisor on a tempdir register socket using a public run_supervisor helper. CLI in main.rs takes --socket.
